approach: owner-directed: at handoff, an identified follow-up is filed as an issue immediately and autonomously -- no approval gate; standing authority granted to the conductor

additive only: the frozen 'a reported follow-up becomes a new CR' scenario is passive (never names who files or when) -- no surface-and-wait-for-approval path exists to replace, so no re-open and no Clearance floor

dedupe specified as BEHAVIOR (search existing open issues, skip on match), not delegated to the repo-private create-issue skill whose confirm-before-filing step contradicts the autonomous mandate and which is not shipped with the sdd plugin
forge-conditional: a source with no issue forge files nothing -- the follow-up stays in the distilled summary only; keeps SDD non-GitHub-specific per the existing delivery-shape contract
file before writing the distilled summary so the summary cites filed issue numbers
reinforces the frozen 'no new floor' contract: autonomous filing removes a wait, adds no escalation
PR open for owner ratification; never merge on the relayed approval

Two non-blocking OBSERVATIONS routed as follow-ups, not gate defects: (architect) filing-specific no-escalation scenario overlaps the general one; (strategist) no mixed-case scenario where some follow-ups match existing issues and others do not -- composition already pinned by the per-follow-up + dedupe pair. Self-asserted within auto-all leash; owner ratifies at the PR.
